comment.text: This is a label for a field where users select or view an AI service provider. It appears in AI settings, either for knowledge base configuration or when managing individual AI providers.

usage.context:
<div className={styles.defaultProviderForm}>
 <FieldContainer
 labelVisible
 isVertical
 labelText={t("AISettings:Provider")}
 removeMargin
 hasError={!!defaultProviderModelsError}
 errorMessage={defaultProviderModelsError || ""}
 errorMessageWidth="100%"
 >

data-testid={
 variant === "add" ? "add-provider-form" : "update-provider-form"
 }
 >
 <FieldContainer
 labelText={t("AISettings:Provider")}
 labelVisible
 isVertical
 removeMargin
 >
 <ComboBox
